intro: Stelis brenneri, also known as "Golden Root", is a plant species belonging to the orchid family, characterized by its unique golden flowers and medicinal properties. Stelis brenneri has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of Stelis brenneri include iridoid glycosides, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Stelis brenneri is commonly prepared into teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in the form of dried root powder and capsules.
